subject: Please update your NYTimes.com account information.
body:
View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTHaI9B81HXJB84spPAAwENcJ9/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

----------------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

Dear New York Times Reader, 

As we continue to innovate -- with new ways to make the world's 
best journalism more engaging and more interactive -- we want to 
be sure that valued readers like you are kept informed of these 
important changes. 

So please take a moment to update your profile. It will only 
take a minute or two and will help us better serve you. Thank 
you for your time -- and for reading The New York Times. 

Sincerely, 
Yasmin Namini
Senior Vice President, Chief Consumer Officer

UPDATE NOW:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTHaI9B81HXJB84spPAAwENcJ9/profile

----------------------------------------------------------------------

You received this email because you are a registered user 
of The New York Times. 

To ensure delivery of emails from The New York Times, please 
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.
